lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and in perfect condition.
The car is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the exterior or interior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Experience automotive perfection with this incredible vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, looking and performing as if it just left the showroom. Meticulously maintained and flawless throughout, this car is a rare find for anyone seeking the very best.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of age and use. The exterior paint has some sun fading on the roof and hood, along with several noticeable scratches and a few small dings on the passenger side. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows some staining and general wear on the driver's seat. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, but the tires are nearing the end of their tread life and the suspension is beginning to feel a bit soft. It is a functional, road-ready vehicle that would benefit from some cosmetic attention and routine maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, with only minor stone chips on the front fascia and a few light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, featuring functional electronics and upholstery that shows very little wear. Mechanically, the car is solid and provides a smooth, reliable ride. It has a consistent service history, and a buyer can expect a dependable vehicle that is ready for daily use without any immediate maintenance needs.
Mint condition.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Boasting a comprehensive service history and exceptional mechanical integrity, it delivers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. The exterior and interior finishes have been preserved with care, ensuring a sophisticated aesthetic and long-term durability. We invite you to experience the superior craftsmanship and reliable performance of this distinguished automobile.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It’s been such a reliable ride and is still in really solid shape! It runs beautifully and has plenty of life left in it for your next adventure. I've taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a driver’s specimen featuring the legendary S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six. The valvetrain is crisp with recent shim adjustments, and the double-VANOS system has been overhauled to ensure optimal variable valve timing across the rev range. Subframe reinforcement plates have been professionally welded, addressing the chassis's known torsional stress points. It sits on a refreshed suspension with poly-bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers, maintaining precise turn-in and lateral stability. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals—including a consistent compression test across all cylinders and a smooth-shifting Getrag 420G 6-speed manual—are robust and track-ready.
Used car. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Fully functional.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive mechanical and cosmetic shape. The exterior shines with its original paint, showing only minor, expected road wear that doesn't detract from its overall curb appeal. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with well-preserved upholstery and all electronics functioning perfectly. It has a documented service history, having recently undergone a full inspection and oil change. The engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts effortlessly, making it a reliable daily driver or a weekend cruiser. With its balanced blend of performance and comfort, this car represents excellent value for a buyer looking for a dependable, high-quality ride.

This exceptional vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience, characterized by its reliable performance and well-preserved interior. Extensively vetted by our technical team, it exhibits the mechanical consistency and structural integrity expected of a premium pre-owned selection. For the individual seeking a dependable yet refined automotive solution, this model presents an outstanding value proposition that balances longevity with prestige.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and reliable performance. This model offers a refined driving experience, featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a balance of sophisticated engineering and proven longevity.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? I’m parting ways with this absolute gem! It’s been well-loved and is in great shape, running super smoothly and looking sharp. It’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I’ve taken really good care of it, so you can drive away with total peace of mind. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between reliability and style, having been maintained with a high level of care. The exterior finish retains a beautiful gloss, accented by clean lines and only the lightest signs of road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally tidy, featuring well-preserved seating surfaces, crisp electronics, and a fresh, non-smoker interior. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission provides seamless shifts, backed by a consistent service history. Equipped with a set of tires with plenty of life remaining and a suspension that handles the road with confidence, this car offers a comfortable and dependable driving experience. It is a solid, turn-key option for anyone looking for a well-cared-for daily driver.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering an exemplary balance of performance and long-term value. It serves as a testament to engineering excellence, providing a sophisticated driving experience that remains both reliable and authoritative.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver, combining dependable performance with a refined aesthetic. Hey friends! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s looking for a new home! She’s been super reliable and is in solid shape, just showing a little bit of character from our adventures together. It drives beautifully and is ready to hit the road with you today. You’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a functional M-Variable limited-slip differential. This unit has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS system inspection. The suspension geometry remains true, benefiting from recent bushing replacements to maintain its signature communicative handling. Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Ready to drive.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor signs of road use consistent with careful driving, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and free of major blemishes. Inside, the cabin feels like a sanctuary; the premium upholstery has been conditioned regularly, showing only light, natural creasing on the driver’s bolster. Every button, screen, and sensor functions exactly as intended, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control. Mechanically, this car is sound, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with recent fluid services and a set of tires with excellent tread remaining. It drives straight, shifts smoothly, and offers a quiet, composed ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership. Included with the sale are two sets of keys and a comprehensive folder of service records, providing peace of mind for its next owner. This is a reliable, turn-key example that is ready for the open road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, this unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and safety. A distinguished choice for those seeking reliable performance and executive presence, this vehicle is offered in turnkey condition and remains ready for immediate acquisition.

Offered for your consideration is a distinguished vehicle of proven caliber. Maintained to rigorous standards, this automobile represents an optimal fusion of mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. It remains in commendable condition, having been serviced regularly to preserve its structural and functional excellence. An ideal acquisition for the professional seeking dependable performance and sophisticated styling without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go and runs like a charm. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 represents a driver-centric example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, complete with individual throttle bodies and a factory 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery through the rear wheels. Mechanically robust, the VANOS system has been serviced, and the subframe has been inspected for structural integrity. The chassis retains its sharp handling characteristics via MacPherson struts and a multi-link rear setup, while the cross-drilled rotors provide consistent heat dissipation. While exhibiting minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, this vehicle remains a mechanically sound platform optimized for performance and tactile feedback.
Clean title. Mechanically sound. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular service history included. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained executive sedan offers the perfect balance of performance and sophistication. The exterior shines in a classic metallic finish, showing only the minor road wear expected of a vehicle that has been driven with care. Step inside to a smoke-free cabin featuring premium leather upholstery that remains supple and free of major blemishes. All onboard technology, from the intuitive navigation system to the premium surround-sound audio, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is sound; it has been serviced regularly at authorized centers, with recent brake pad replacements and a fresh set of high-performance tires. Whether you’re commuting in comfort or enjoying a weekend drive, this car delivers a smooth, responsive experience. It comes with a complete service history and two sets of keys, ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing mechanical integrity with a well-preserved aesthetic. Meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance, it features a refined interior and a robust powertrain that reflects a high standard of previous ownership. Offering reliable operation and a commanding road presence, this selection provides exceptional value for those seeking a sophisticated and dependable driving experience.
